section.title: Step 1: Enable mypy strict
section.p: Action: [tool.mypy] strict = true; override per legacy module.

section.title: Step 2: Type public functions
section.p: Action: Add types to every def in __init__.py and public API.

section.title: Step 3: Add Pydantic at IO
section.p: Action: Author BaseModel for each HTTP/queue body.

section.title: Step 4: Eliminate Any
section.p: Action: Replace Any with concrete types or object.

section.title: Step 5: Wire CI
section.p: Action: Add mypy step to pre-commit + CI.
